message:
web: Improve log detail sidebar UI

- Parse model strings properly (e.g. claude-opus-4-5-20251101 → Claude Opus 4.5)
- Add tooltip showing raw model ID on hover
- Use Brain icon for model display
- Move author info to sidebar with avatar
- Show GitHub icon for github.com repos with shortened path
- Rename

🔮 View transcript: https://agentlogs.ai/s/3927c7e6-69eb-4e00-8651-be328998ff54"Thread" section to "Log"
- Remove unused Labels section
